LinearLayout:
<TextView android:id="@+id/text1" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="28dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/add_repository" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="Repository Name" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="normal" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/repo_name_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:autofillHints="username" android:background="?attr/boxItemBackground" android:hint="@string/repository_name_hint" android:inputType="text" android:nextFocusDown="@id/repo_url_input" android:padding="18dp" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textColorHint="?attr/grayTextColor" android:textSize="16sp" tools:ignore="LabelFor" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="Repository URL" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="normal" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/repo_url_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="36dp" android:autofillHints="url" android:background="?attr/boxItemBackground" android:hint="@string/repository_url_hint" android:inputType="textUri" android:nextFocusUp="@id/repo_name_input" android:padding="18dp" android:textColor="?attr/textColor" android:textColorHint="?attr/grayTextColor" android:textSize="16sp" tools:ignore="LabelFor" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/cancel_btt" style="@style/WhiteButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:text="@string/sort_cancel" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:backgroundTint="?attr/boxItemBackground" app:strokeColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:strokeWidth="1.5dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/apply_btt" style="@style/WhiteButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="52dp" android:text="@string/add_repository" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" />
